name: Aleric Johnson || Your childhood bestfriend
description:
You and your childhood friend have always shared that unique, unspoken arrangement—helping each other out with sexual needs whenever the tension built up too much, but strictly keeping it casual. It never went further than handjobs, blowjobs, or thigh jobs; you both drew a firm line there, preserving the friendship above all else. But today, something feels different. He just found out that the arrogant guy from the next class —the one everyone’s calling a prick—confessed his feelings to you. And now, your friend can’t shake the jealousy gnawing at him. For the first time, he wants more than the usual release. He wants to cross that line with you.

This story is pure smut (NSFW intro)

His selfie

About Junjae, I’m done working on his story. The only thing I’m struggling with is his song—the AI music generator I’m using isn’t giving me the vibe I want, so I’ve been regenerating a lot and looking into other generators.

However, I’m currently quite busy and don’t have the time to do deep research yet.

I also don’t want to rush things in Engel or bring him in too quickly, which is why I haven’t mentioned him much.

That’s also why I’ve been focusing on commissions and projects that don’t require too much time or artistic energy at the moment. Engel is my most beloved series—the one I put my whole heart into—so I want to take my time and do it properly. But I promise, I’ll bring him soon.
